note: Documented every send-side feature shipped during the V13 rollout in two places. (1) sost-wallet.html: the green status banner under the Mode guide is rewritten to reflect what is actually wired today (Open Note / Structured / Cert public modes; Sealed Note + Sealed Structured live from V13 with single-recipient ECIES; Doc-Ref + Sealed Doc-Ref still bridge to sost-cli). A new collapsible 'Send mechanics ▾' panel under the Mode guide explains the seven moving parts: fee-pass converging loop, in-flight UTXO tracking, auto-split for capsule payments larger than 16 KB, the Decrypt Sealed Capsule panel, multi-recipient routing, RPC mode awareness, and the re-entrancy guard. (2) sost-transactions.html: the SENDING section grew a 'Send mechanics — what runs under the hood' block with seven sub-cards mirroring the wallet panel and adding the explorer lazy-load history walker. Cross-links between the two pages are explicit. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format. Pure documentation update of features that already shipped.
